data.title: pre-bash hook: hook-drift validation failure blocks Bash tool with no open tracking ticket
data.description:
## Incident Overview
The pre-bash hook blocked a Bash tool call with: UNTRACKED VALIDATION FAILURES: hook-drift. The hook guidance says to create a tracking ticket, but no hook-drift ticket exists and check-validation-failures.sh did not auto-create one.

## Expected Behavior
Either the hook-drift validation passes, or a tracking ticket is auto-created by check-validation-failures.sh.

## Actual Behavior
Validation fails, no ticket exists, agent is blocked from running certain Bash commands.

## Evidence
Observed during session worktree-20260412-143336 when attempting to test temp directory operations.
